meta.title: [STUDIO NAME] — Web design and development studio
meta.description: Freelance web design and development studio. We design and build bespoke websites and digital products, from idea to deploy.

hero.subtitle: We work with a few companies at a time. From the first line of code to launch day, and beyond.

services.title: What we do
services.intro: Four areas. The same method for each.

items.title: Showcase sites & landing pages
items.body: Sites that say one thing and say it well. Clear structure, considered content, low load times.

items.title: Headless e-commerce
items.body: Stores built on a headless architecture. Catalogue, checkout and shipping that hold up as you grow.

items.title: Custom web apps
items.body: Applications for internal processes or customer-facing products. From first version to maintenance.

items.title: Technical consulting & audit
items.body: A review of performance, accessibility and existing code. A clear direction without rebuilding everything.

portfolio.title: Recent projects
portfolio.intro: Three clients, three sectors. The same way of working.

contact.title: Let's talk about the project.
contact.body: Tell us what you need and when. We reply within two business days.

form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject

contact.successBody: Thanks. We'll get back to you shortly at the address you gave us.
